description:
The "Magical Citadel of Endymion" was one of the few cities where people could live without fear of monster, thanks to its military might and advanced magical technology.
It was ruled by one of the Three Sages of the Magistus, "Endymion, the Master Magician".
Having sensed the signs of the evil deity`s revival, Endymion prepares for the coming battle, yet a shadow of doubt still lingers in his heart.
At his side, his companion and the moon goddess, "Artemis", quietly watches over him.
Source: Official English Website

titles.title: マギストスII「神聖魔導王 エンディミオン」
